raw_consumer_statement:
Ive booked XXXX tickets with XXXX XXXX on XXXX Ive had an issue with my sky miles number. Ive googled the sky miles customer service and called a number only for fixing the number. 
They pretended that they are XXXX which they were not and told me in order to fix that problem they need to cancel my original tickets and reissue another ticket and I will get refund from delta. They ( XXXX XXXX ) charged my credit card for {$4100.00} on XX/XX/year> for new tickets and they gave me the same tickets from XXXX with the same ticket number and same confirmation number. 
Since then Ive disputed this charge 4 times and every time American Express closes my dispute and leave the charge on me. Ive sent my original tickets to AMEX to compare the numbers with XXXX XXXX documents but they dont listen. 
Ive been charged XXXX times for same tickets.
